name: Mobile Car Buyer
description_short: Mobile Car Buyer pays cash for used vehicles at your location in the NY/NJ/CT tri-state area. They come to you, handle all paperwork, and complete the transaction in ~30 minutes.
description_long:
Mobile Car Buyer is a family-owned used vehicle purchasing company founded in 2005 and headquartered in New York, NY. The business is licensed and bonded by the New York Department of Motor Vehicles (Facility No. 7099388) and registered with the New York Department of State under the legal entity Mobile Car Buyer Corp. They operate exclusively within the tri-state area covering New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut.

The company's core service is straightforward: they purchase used cars, trucks, SUVs, and vans directly from private sellers at the seller's location. A company representative travels to the seller, performs an on-site vehicle assessment, completes all required paperwork, and takes possession of the vehicle — typically within about 30 minutes. Payment is made by secured company check, certified check, or cash depending on the situation. Critically, Mobile Car Buyer also handles existing auto loan or lease payoffs on behalf of the seller, removing a common friction point in private vehicle sales. They accept vehicles in any year, make, model, and condition.

What distinguishes Mobile Car Buyer from competitors like CarMax or private listing platforms is the fully mobile, no-travel-required model combined with the promise of a fast, 30-minute transaction. With a 5.0/5 Google rating across 111 reviews and approximately 120 reviews aggregated on Birdeye, the company has built a strong reputation for speed and professionalism in the New York market over its two-decade operating history. The ability to pay off outstanding auto loans directly is a practical differentiator for sellers who still owe on their vehicles.

For sellers who prioritize speed and convenience over maximizing sale price, Mobile Car Buyer delivers genuine value. The mobile model eliminates the hassle of listing, negotiating with strangers, or traveling to a dealership. However, as with any instant-buy car service, sellers should expect offers below private-sale market value in exchange for that convenience. The service area is strictly limited to NY, NJ, and CT — no national coverage. Yelp reviews surface some concerns about title documentation handling and responsiveness in certain cases. There is no online quote tool; all engagements begin with a phone call.
address: 2040 Frederick Douglass Blvd, New York, NY 10026

pricing.guarantee_details: Not applicable — this is a vehicle purchase transaction, not a subscription or service fee arrangement.

certifications: Licensed and bonded by NY DMV — Facility No. 7099388
Licensed with NY Department of State

pros: Founded in 2005 — over 20 years serving the NY tri-state market
5.0/5 Google rating from 111 reviews, reflecting consistent customer satisfaction
Fully mobile service — company representative comes to the seller's location, no travel required
Transactions completed in approximately 30 minutes including assessment and paperwork
Handles auto loan and lease payoffs directly, removing a major obstacle for sellers with outstanding balances
Licensed and bonded by the NY DMV (Facility No. 7099388) — verifiable state credentials
Accepts any make, model, year, and condition with no-obligation vehicle assessment
cons: Service area strictly limited to New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut — no coverage outside the tri-state area
No online quote tool — sellers must initiate contact by phone with no instant estimate available
BBB rating not publicly confirmed and company is not BBB accredited
Yelp reviews include complaints about title documentation handling and responsiveness in some cases
As an instant-buy service, offers will typically be below private-sale market value — sellers trade price for speed and convenience
best_for: NY/NJ/CT area vehicle owners who need to sell quickly without traveling to a dealership
Sellers with an active auto loan or lease who want a single-transaction payoff and exit
People selling vehicles in poor or unusual condition that dealers or private buyers may reject
Sellers who value convenience and a fast 30-minute transaction over maximizing their sale price
diagnosis: Mobile Car Buyer is genuinely well-suited for tri-state area residents who want to convert a used vehicle into cash with minimal friction — particularly those still carrying a loan or lease balance. The main caveat is geographic: this service is exclusively local to NY, NJ, and CT, and like all instant-buy car services, convenience comes at the cost of receiving less than full private-sale market value.
services: On-site used car purchasing at seller's location
On-site title transfer and paperwork completion
Auto loan payoff on behalf of seller
Auto lease payoff on behalf of seller
Purchase of vehicles in any condition (any year, make, model)
Purchase of trucks, SUVs, and vans
